jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Swiggy
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Swiggy in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Swiggy:
Swiggy is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy!
